content:
<1>Admin account types and their privileges

<2>{{productName}} admin
{{productName}} configuration, room creation and administration, ability to invite and manage users in {{productName}} and in virtual rooms, ability to manage access rights.

<3>Room admin
Room administration and archiving, user invitation and management. Several admins can be assigned to a room.

<4>User
Users can create and edit files in the room, but can't create rooms, manage users, or access settings.

comment.text: This translation key is used for a tooltip that describes user roles and their corresponding privileges in a workspace configuration. It appears as a tooltip on a settings page, providing an overview of available roles (Admin, Room Admin, User) and their respective access rights.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation for tag <4> is 'ισχύος' (power/force), which is a mistranslation of the role 'User'.
The sentence following tag <4> uses 'Οι ισχύος' (The powers), which is grammatically incorrect and semantically wrong for 'Users'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Οι χρήστες μπορούν να δημιουργούν και να επεξεργάζονται αρχεία στο δωμάτιο, αλλά δεν μπορούν να δημιουργούν δωμάτια, να διαχειρίζονται χρήστες ή να έχουν πρόσβαση στις ρυθμίσεις.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation for tag <4> is 'Avanzado' (Advanced), whereas the English source is 'User'. This changes the meaning of the role description.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
<4>Usuario
Los usuarios pueden crear y editar archivos en la sala, pero no pueden crear salas, administrar usuarios ni acceder a la configuración.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation for tag <4> is 'Avancé' (Advanced), whereas the English source is 'User'. This changes the meaning of the role description.
The description for tag <4> uses 'Avancés' (Advanced users) instead of 'Utilisateurs' (Users), which is inconsistent with the role name error and the source text.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Les utilisateurs peuvent créer et modifier des fichiers dans la salle, mais ne peuvent ni créer de salles, ni gérer des utilisateurs, ni accéder aux paramètres.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation for tag <4> 'User' is 'Esperto' (Expert), which changes the meaning of the user role.
The translation for tag <3> 'Room admin' is 'Amministrazione delle stanze' (Room administration), which describes an action/process rather than a role/title.
The term 'Room admin' (a role/person) was translated as 'Kamerbeheer' (the action/management), which changes the meaning from a user type to a process.
The term 'User' (the role) was left in English ('Users') in the heading and the description, which is inconsistent with the rest of the Dutch translation.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion:
<4>Gebruiker
Gebruikers kunnen bestanden aanmaken en bewerken in de kamer, maar kunnen geen kamers aanmaken, gebruikers beheren of instellingen openen.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The translation for tag <3> 'Room admin' is translated as 'Administrja e dhomës' (Room administration), which describes an action/process rather than a user role/type as required by the context.
